title: 'Two Corner Fight': TVK Announces Candidates For 2026 Tamil Nadu Polls, Actor Vijay To Contest 2 Seats
description: Emphasising a ‘people-first’ agenda, Vijay urged voters to give his party a chance as he announced the TVK candidate list for the party's electoral debut. Tamil Nadu will go to the polls in a single phase on April 23, covering a total of 234 constituencies in the State.
